gate_order_changed: the perturbation amplification gate decides whether propagation-dependent work and the rate ladder run at all; nothing is promoted from a local fit
protocol: 4 weight-space control (constant, standing in for the closed families)
7 perturbation amplification at multiple magnitudes (THE GATE)
10 exact 0.75/0.50/0.333 artifacts only if the functional direction survives propagation

amplification_gate.discrimination_proven: selftest on synthetic operators reports CONTRACTIVE at gain 0.6 (min amp 0.61) and EXPANSIVE at gain 1.6 (min amp 1.47); the discrimination GLM-5.2's residual stream could not offer

blocked_on: a deepseek_v4 NumPy reference forward (MLA + DSA index_topk 512 + sqrtsoftplus noaux_tc routing + fp4/E8M0 expert dequant) to provide real teacher trajectories; the harness runs the moment that TeacherProvider exists
source_precision_note: experts are already fp4, so a 1.0 complete-BPW target is a ~4x reduction here, not the ~16x a BF16 parent implies; the byte accounting must carry the source-format caveat
not_evidence_of: capability; the harness has only been exercised on a synthetic teacher
